channel.title: Dns on Dodoslav - eBlog
channel.description: Recent content in Dns on Dodoslav - eBlog

item.title: Ako na domáce home.arpa domény v Unbound
item.description: Vytvorenie zóny: echo 'server: local-zone: "home.arpa." nodefault auth-zone: name: "home.arpa." zonefile: "/etc/unbound/unbound.conf.d/home-arpa.zone" for-downstream: yes for-upstream: no ' > /etc/unbound/unbound.conf.d/home-arpa.conf Vytvorenie záznamov: echo '$TTL 30 $ORIGIN home.arpa. @ IN SOA ns1.home.arpa. hostmaster.home.arpa. ( 2026022701 ; serial (YYYYMMDDnn) 3600 ; refresh 900 ; retry 1209600 ; expire 300 ) ; negative cache IN NS ns1.home.arpa. # adresa resolvera ns1 IN A 192.168.0.2 ; --- Your requested records --- router IN A 192.168.0.1

item.title: Unbound DNS resolver na Debian-e 13
item.description: Ako nainštalovať DNS-cache server na Debian, konkrétne Unbound. Inštalácia apt install bind9-dnsutils net-tools dns-root-data iproute2 apt install unbound Nastavenie ovládania Remote-control tu vypínam, zakomentované riadky niesú podporované v tejto verzií Unbound. echo 'remote-control: control-enable: no control-interface: /run/unbound.socket #control-use-cert: yes #control-perms: 600 #control-owner: root #control-group: root' > /etc/unbound/unbound.conf.d/remote-control.conf Základné nastavenia Tu si dať pozor na ten access-control a pridať tam svoju sieť ak je iná. echo ' server: interface: 0.0.0.0 interface: ::0

item.title: Unbound DNS resolver na Debian-e 11
item.description: Ako nainštalovať DNS-cache server na Debian, konkrétne Unbound. Inštalácia apt-get install bind9-utils dnsutils net-tools apt-get install unbound Konfigurácia server: # the working directory. directory: "/etc/unbound" # run as the unbound user username: unbound verbosity: 2 # uncomment and increase to get more logging. # listen on all interfaces, answer queries from the local subnet. interface: 0.0.0.0 # comment out the following line if your system doesn't have IPv6. interface: ::0

item.title: Ako pridať daľší WiFi router
item.description: WiFI router je hrozny nazov V prvom rade by som chcel povedat preco je "WiFi router" nestastny nazov. Slovicko "router" sa da prelozit ako slovo smerovac. Smerovac je zariadenie ktore sluzi na to aby zariadenia v roznych IP sietach mohli spolu komunikovat. Napriklad vsetky servery/zariadenia na internete, a zariadenia ktore mam u seba doma. Takze router je zariadenie ktore sluzi na smerovanie komunikacie medzi mojou domacnostou a internetom. Slovicko WiFi zanema ze to podporuje WiFi a ze to bude vediet spravit WiFi siet na ktoru sa budem moct pripojit.
